sentence_ko: 그 영화는 가공하지 않은 감정으로 가득했어요.
tts_text: The film was full of raw emotion.
display_sentence: The film was full of raw emotion.

sentence_ko: 그녀의 격려가 제게 결정적인 역할을 했어요.
tts_text: Her encouragement really tipped the scales for me.
display_sentence: Her encouragement really tipped the scales for me.

tts_text: Trust your gut instinct on this one.
display_sentence: Trust your gut instinct on this one.

tts_text: She's good at masking her feelings.
display_sentence: She's good at masking her feelings.

tts_text: I felt completely out of my depth emotionally.
display_sentence: I felt completely out of my depth emotionally.

tts_text: I'm in two minds about whether to go.
display_sentence: I'm in two minds about whether to go.

sentence_ko: 그 질문이 정말 아픈 데를 건드렸어요.
tts_text: That question really touched a nerve.
display_sentence: That question really touched a nerve.

sentence_ko: 그 모든 것에도 불구하고 그녀는 감정적으로 놀랍도록 강해요.
tts_text: She's incredibly emotionally resilient despite everything.
display_sentence: She's incredibly emotionally resilient despite everything.

sentence_en: I finally ___ after all those years.
sentence_ko: 모든 세월이 지나 마침내 억울함이 풀렸어요.
tts_text: I finally feel vindicated after all those years.
